summary:
Claim: Discontinuation of venlafaxine can lead to anxiety and insomnia due to rebound neurotransmitter activity.  
Evidence: - Venlafaxine, an SNRI, inhibits serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake; abrupt cessation causes rebound activation leading directly to anxiety and insomnia. - Clinical studies report frequent discontinuation syndrome cases involving these symptoms, especially when stopped abruptly.  
Answer: A
